Online certificate generator that works with Chrome's TPM, and RUCKUS Cloudpath Enrollment System.

Use this extension to generate user or device certificates for managed Chromebooks. The certificate is generated via Cloudpath ES using its built-in PKI, or a third party PKI.

Note: This extension requires ChromeOS version 109 or newer, an internet connection, and requires that the extension be deployed via the management console (This means managed users and devices will see the extension automatically installed to their device per enterprise policy).

For more information, visit www.ruckusnetworks.com or contact RUCKUS Networks.

Use of this extension is governed by the Cloudpath EULA at https://xpc.cloudpath.net/documents/eula.pdf.  Use of this software signifies your acceptance of this agreement.

Collect attendance in a Google Sheet from a Google Meet.

Meet Attendance requires logging in and Syncing your Chrome browser. When in Meet select the participants view. Accept the permissions. Close and reopen the people to capture attendance. Click the Attendance icon to open the Attendance Spreadsheet. Mouse over for further options, Add a sheet in the Spreadsheet, Create a new Spreadsheet, Turn Attendance collection off, Auto Scroll through participants, Snapshot attendance. Attendance duration will be tracked.
Premium: 
Compare your classroom roster to the participants in the meet. Know who is absent from your Meet. 
Set the frequency for auto capturing attendance. Leaving the Participants view open attendance will be captured at the set frequency.

Subscribe to premium for $2.50 monthly.

Enables printing from the Google Chrome browser to YSoft SAFEQ.

The YSoft SAFEQ Chrome Print extension allows the release of a print job from a Google Chrome browser. The job is sent from the Google Chrome browser to the YSoft SAFEQ Chrome Print backend server, which is an independent component installed on a dedicated server. The backend server processes the job and sends it to YSoft SAFEQ.

The backend server is available in Extension store on https://portal.ysoft.com as "GOOGLE CHROME PRINT" (extension code SWC-133)

The print administrator registers a printer in YSoft SAFEQ Chrome Print backend server and assigns it to a user or role. A user will add the extension to the Google Chrome browser and configure the connection to the YSoft SAFEQ Chrome Print backend server. When the user is registered in the system, an assigned printer will be displayed in the list of available printers in the print dialog. The user can send a print job to this printer using all available print features and the print job will arrive to the YSoft SAFEQ.

Get actionable insights on your organization's SaaS usage

Zluri is an enterprise SaaS Management Platform(SMP). It helps you discover, manage, optimize your SaaS stack from a single dashboard. In short, Zluri puts the IT Teams back in control of their new Saas-ified landscape.

Zluri helps to bring shadow IT to light, proactively monitor and manage SaaS spend, automates end-to-end SaaS apps renewal management.

Zluri is data-driven and helps IT teams simplify, plan, secure, and get the most out of their SaaS apps portfolio.

Zluri uses various ways to discover SaaS applications. The browser extension is one of them.

Zluri browser extension helps IT administrators discover the SaaS applications & used by employees of the organization.

The browser extension runs locally on the client-side to read browser activities & reports them to Zluri server for analysis, Where we identify & analyze the SaaS application-related activities & present them on the Zluri dashboard.

We collect only non-sensitive information from the browser like The URL, Title, Timestamp of opening/closing the tab. We do not read the cookies saved in the browser, browser history or any content from the websites visited.

Steps to install it:
1. Install the extension in your browser.

2. Enter your work email. 

3. We will send you a verification link on your email address. Please click on the link to verify your email & sign in.

4. This step is optional. You can enter the website urls you do not wish to be tracked for.

You can reach out to us through any of the following channels in case you face any difficulties in installing this extension.

Phone : 🇺🇸 +1 628-243-5870 🇮🇳 +91 9019 096 678

Email : tech-support@zluri.com

You can also reach out to us through the live chat window on the bottom right of the screen.

We will respond to your query within 24 hrs.

Enables printing from the Google Chrome browser to Dispatcher Paragon.

The Dispatcher Paragon Chrome Print extension allows the release of a print job from a Google Chrome browser. The job is sent from the Google Chrome browser to the Dispatcher Paragon Chrome Print backend server, which is an independent component installed on a dedicated server. The backend server processes the job and sends it to Dispatcher Paragon.

The print administrator registers a printer in Dispatcher Paragon Chrome Print backend server and assigns it to a user or role. A user will add the extension to the Google Chrome browser and configure the connection to the Dispatcher Paragon Chrome Print backend server. When the user is registered in the system, an assigned printer will be displayed in the list of available printers in the print dialog. The user can send a print job to this printer using all available print features and the print job will arrive to the Dispatcher Paragon.

SheetWhiz: Excel & PPT Shortcuts, Tracing, & What-If for Sheets & Slides
SheetWhiz brings Trace Precedents, Trace Dependents, Goal Seek, What-If, Macabacus format cycling, Excel and PPT shortcuts to Google

SheetWhiz brings Excel-style shortcuts, auditing tools, and modeling functionality to Google Sheets and Google Slides. Built for finance, FP&A, investing, operations, and other spreadsheet-heavy workflows, it helps you move faster, audit formulas more easily, and bring more of the speed and productivity you expect from Excel into Google Workspace.

► KEY FEATURES

• Excel and PowerPoint shortcuts in Google Sheets and Google Slides
Use familiar shortcuts across Mac and Windows, with fully customizable key mappings to match your workflow.

• Trace Precedents and Trace Dependents
Instantly see formula relationships, jump between linked cells, and navigate spreadsheet logic with arrow keys. Great for auditing models and understanding how formulas flow across a sheet.

• Goal Seek and What-If analysis
Run Goal Seek and build one- and two-variable data sensitivities directly in Google Sheets for financial models, budgets, forecasts, and scenario analysis.

• Format Cycling
Apply consistent number formats, company colors, and indentation cycles with a single shortcut, similar to workflows used in tools like Macabacus and Arixcel.

• Export Selection as Image
Copy cells into Google Slides or Docs while preserving formatting and linking back to the source spreadsheet.

• Auto-Color for faster audits
Quickly highlight hardcoded inputs and linked cells so it is easier to review spreadsheet structure and spot issues.

► WHY SHEETWHIZ

• Familiar to users of Excel add-ins like Macabacus, Arixcel, FactSet, and CapIQ, but built specifically for Google Sheets and Google Slides
• Designed for finance and operations teams that want Excel-like speed while working in Google Workspace
• Works across both Mac and Windows with native key mappings
• Lets you customize shortcuts and formatting cycles to fit your team’s workflow
• Secure and private: SheetWhiz never sees or stores your spreadsheet data and is SOC 2 Type 2 compliant

► INCLUDED SHORTCUT CATEGORIES

SheetWhiz includes shortcuts and tools for:

• Trace Precedents and Trace Dependents
• Goal Seek and What-If data sensitivities
• Paste Special actions like formulas and values
• Insert and delete rows and columns
• Borders, alignment, autofit, row height, and column width
• Decimal controls, fonts, and text wrapping
• Filters, freeze panes, merge and unmerge
• Number, font color, and fill color cycles
• Export Selection as Image
• Auto-Color for spreadsheet audits
• Google Slides alignment, layering, grouping, distribution, and text formatting shortcuts

► FREE TRIAL AND PLANS

All new installs include a 21-day free trial of the Pro plan. After the trial, you will continue on the Free plan with core formatting shortcuts, with the option to upgrade anytime.

Since it is for companies, it is possible to save QA logs, specify prohibited words, restrict use by employees, and mass personal information.

Please contact Sateraito Office Co., Ltd. for the management function, which requires a separate administrator installation.

FAQs
